---
name: New Rule Proposal
about: Suggest a new rule to override a specific LLM design bias
title: '[RULE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Which skill does this belong in?
<!-- forge / forge-mobile / forge-dashboard / forge-motion / new skill needed -->

## What LLM bias does this rule override?
<!-- Be specific: "LLMs default to X because Y" -->

## What is the rule?
<!-- State the rule clearly and testably -->

## Bad output example (before rule)
<!-- What does the AI produce without this rule? -->

## Good output example (after rule)
<!-- What should the AI produce with this rule? -->

## Is this framework-agnostic?
<!-- Yes / No — if No, explain why it belongs in a specialized skill -->
